an1.248:1.1: "Foremost, *bhikkhus*, among my lay disciples who were the first to go for refuge is Tapussa and Bhallika, the merchants.
an1.249:1.1: … Among donors: Sudatta the householder, Anāthapiṇḍika.
an1.250:1.1: … Among speakers on *dhamma*: Citta the householder of Macchikāsaṇḍa.
an1.251:1.1: … Among those who gather an assembly with the four bases of fellowship: Hatthaka of Āḷavī.
an1.252:1.1: … Among those who give fine things: Mahānāma the Sakyan.
an1.253:1.1: … Among those who give pleasing things: Ugga the householder of Vesālī.
an1.254:1.1: … Among attendants of the *saṅgha*: Uggata the householder of Hatthigāma.
an1.255:1.1: … Among those with confirmed confidence: Sūrambaṭṭha.
an1.256:1.1: … Among those with confidence in a person: Jīvaka Komārabhacca.
an1.257:1.1: … Among those who are trusting: Nakulapitā the householder."
